title: Velvety Mexican Yautia Polish
description: A midnight-craving dish featuring yautia root vegetables, folded into a velvety texture that is both bitter and satisfying, perfect for high-protein diets.
instructions: Peel the yautia roots and cut them into small cubes.
In a skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced onion and minced garlic; sauté for about 5 minutes until softened.
Add salt, pepper, and black beans to the skillet. Cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Gradually fold in the yautia cubes, ensuring they are evenly coated with the seasoned mixture.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes or until yautia is tender but not falling apart.
Stir in sour cream gently while continuing to simmer. Adjust seasoning as needed.
